title: Sunteck Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sunteck Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
